profiles.title: Default helpers
profiles.description: Install these once globally so every project starts from the same fast baseline.

profiles.title: Workflow packs
profiles.description: Optional workflow systems you may want later, but not by default.

profiles.title: Opt-in extras
profiles.description: Useful additions for specific workflows or project types.

tools.title: RTK
tools.summary: Token-saving shell workflow helper for Claude Code.
tools.setupNote: Optimus installs the RTK binary and then runs `rtk init -g --auto-patch`.

tools.title: Ralph
tools.summary: Global Claude Code execution toolkit and command layer.
tools.setupNote: Optimus clones Ralph to a temp directory, runs `./install.sh`, and removes the temp clone.

tools.title: Get Shit Done
tools.summary: Spec-driven workflow pack for later manual install.

tools.title: Superpowers
tools.summary: Skill-oriented workflow pack for later manual install.

tools.title: Claude Mem
tools.summary: Persistent memory layer for heavier workflows.

tools.title: UI UX Pro Max
tools.summary: UI-heavy design skill pack for frontend projects.

tools.title: Everything Claude Code
tools.summary: Reference collection for later manual adoption.
